title: Workshop: Build a Multi-State Service Availability Board
summary: Workshop: Build a Multi-State Service Availability Board retrieves prior skills in an original heat-relief location status board with non-color evidence scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css color formats, css color relationships, css color contrast, css color not only, css gradients in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real heat-relief location status board with non-color evidence artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
